testcase.name: setUp

error.message: Could not start a new session. Possible causes are invalid address of the remote server or browser start-up failure. Connection refused: no further information Host info: host: 'DESKTOP-73K6JOR', ip: '192.168.1.7' Build info: version: '4.41.0', revision: '9fc754f' System info: os.name: 'Windows 10', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '11.0.15' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.remote.RemoteWebDriver Command: [null, newSession {capabilities=[Capabilities {browserName: MicrosoftEdge, platformName: Windows 10}]}] Capabilities {browserName: MicrosoftEdge, platformName: Windows 10}
